data.title: Tokai Corp. Updates Shareholder Meeting and Dividend Payment Dates
data.description:
Tokai ( (JP:9729) ) has provided an announcement.

Tokai Corp. has issued corrections to its previously announced consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025. The corrections pertain to the scheduled dates for the annual general meeting of shareholders and the commencement of dividend payments, which have been adjusted to June 26, 2025, and June 27, 2025, respectively. These changes reflect Tokai’s commitment to accurate and timely communication with its stakeholders.

More about Tokai

Tokai Corp. operates in the finance sector and is listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The company is involved in providing financial services and products, focusing on delivering value to its shareholders and maintaining transparency in its operations.

data.title: Yerbae Brands and Safety Shot Announce Merger Plans
data.description:
New activity is brewing for Yerbae Brands ( ($TSE:YERB.U) ). The company has submitted a Form DEFM14A to the SEC, indicating an upcoming shareholder vote. This form gives shareholders all the information they need to develop an informed vote. Read on to learn more about the proposed company action.

On May 6, 2025, Yerbae Brands Corp. announced a proposed business combination with Safety Shot, Inc., which was initially agreed upon on January 7, 2025. This merger will result in Safety Shot acquiring all outstanding shares of Yerbae, with Yerbae shareholders receiving 0.2918 shares of Safety Shot for each Yerbae share held. The merger, set for shareholder meetings on June 12, 2025, aims to create a combined company where Safety Shot stakeholders will own approximately 75.8% and Yerbae stakeholders 24.2%. The boards of both companies have unanimously recommended that their respective shareholders approve the merger, which is expected to enhance their market positioning and operational synergies.

More about Yerbae Brands

Yerbae Brands Corp. operates in the beverage industry, focusing on health-conscious energy drinks. The company aims to cater to consumers seeking natural and plant-based alternatives to traditional energy drinks.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $4.14M

Learn more about YERB.U stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: China Parenting Network Approves Share Consolidation and Capital Reduction
data.description:
China Parenting Network Holdings Limited ( (HK:1736) ) just unveiled an announcement.

China Parenting Network Holdings Limited announced that all resolutions proposed at their Extraordinary General Meeting on May 9, 2025, were passed by shareholders. The resolutions included a share consolidation and a capital reduction with share sub-division, which are set to become effective on May 13, 2025. This strategic move is expected to impact the company’s share structure and potentially its market positioning, reflecting a significant step in its corporate restructuring efforts.

More about China Parenting Network Holdings Limited

China Parenting Network Holdings Limited operates in the parenting industry, focusing on providing online platforms and services tailored for parents and families. The company is incorporated in the Cayman Islands and is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

data.title: Green Landscaping Group AB Annual General Meeting Resolutions
data.description:
Green Landscaping Group AB ( (SE:GREEN) ) has provided an announcement.

Green Landscaping Group AB held its annual general meeting on May 9, 2025, where several key resolutions were passed. The company decided to carry forward its accumulated profits without paying dividends for 2024 and re-elected its board members and auditor. Additionally, an incentive program was established, and the board was authorized to issue new shares and manage share acquisitions to support potential acquisitions and investments, aiming to enhance shareholder value and improve capital structure.

More about Green Landscaping Group AB

Green Landscaping Group AB operates in the landscaping industry, providing services related to outdoor environments, maintenance, and landscaping solutions. The company focuses on enhancing green spaces and infrastructure, catering to both public and private sectors.

data.title: GSH Corporation Limited Holds Annual General Meeting
data.description:
GSH ( (SG:BDX) ) has provided an update.

GSH Corporation Limited held its Annual General Meeting on April 25, 2025, in Singapore, chaired by Mr. Ng Hin Lee. During the meeting, Dr. Sam Goi Seng Hui, the Executive Chairman, expressed gratitude to shareholders and stakeholders for their support, and the COO and Group Financial Controller presented on the company’s recent residential project in Kota Kinabalu, financial highlights for FY2024, and a proposed share buy-back mandate. Voting on resolutions was conducted by poll, with CNP Business Advisory Pte. Ltd. appointed as scrutineers.

data.title: De La Rue Announces Acquisition by ACR Bidco
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from De La Rue ( (GB:DLAR) ).

De La Rue PLC has announced a recommended all-cash acquisition by ACR Bidco Limited, a company associated with Atlas Holdings LLC. The acquisition, to be executed through a Court-sanctioned scheme of arrangement, involves the entire issued share capital of De La Rue. The directors of De La Rue, advised by Deutsche Numis, consider the terms fair and reasonable and recommend shareholders vote in favor of the scheme. The acquisition is expected to be effective by July 2, 2025, pending necessary approvals.

Spark’s Take on GB:DLAR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:DLAR is a Neutral.

De La Rue’s overall stock score is largely influenced by its poor financial health, marked by declining revenues and net losses. However, technical analysis shows some bullish momentum, and strategic corporate events hint at potential improvement. Despite these positives, the negative valuation metrics and shareholder changes present notable concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:DLAR stock, click here.

More about De La Rue

De La Rue PLC operates in the security printing and papermaking industry, specializing in the production of banknotes, identity documents, and other secure products. The company is known for its focus on providing secure solutions to governments and businesses worldwide.

data.title: Lloyds Banking Group Publishes Final Terms for EUR 1 Billion Notes
data.description:
Lloyds Banking ( (GB:LLOY) ) has issued an announcement.

Lloyds Banking Group plc has announced the publication of the final terms for its EUR 1 billion 4.00% Fixed Rate Reset Dated Subordinated Tier 2 Notes due 2035, as part of its £25 billion Euro Medium Term Note Programme. This issuance is a strategic move to strengthen the company’s capital structure, potentially enhancing its financial stability and market position, while targeting eligible counterparties and professional clients under EU and UK regulations.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:LLOY is a Outperform.

However, declining profitability and cash flow issues pose challenges. The stock’s reasonable valuation and attractive dividend yield balance these concerns, providing a favorable long-term potential.
